name: 北九州 (Kitakyūshū)
author: ahkimn
description: Highly-detailed map of the 北九州 (Kitakyūshū) metropolitan region using 2020/2021 Japanese census data. Includes the city of 下関 (Shimonoseki) across the Kanmon Straits as well as special demand for primary/secondary/post-secondary education + airports.
